author: potuz
content: I'm not certain of the usefulness of this call to be honest. Having a full assembly of coredevs for such a broad call every week seeks like a waste of time. I kinda want to be there because ePBS devnet timing will be decided, but during this call we have never been able to discuss any technical aspect of the EIP it takes an entire hour per week (and several of these calls pile up) and it also contributed to loosing the actual breakout were we could discuss technical aspects of the EIPs we're implementing. I feel there's an expectancy of us actually coming to this call, which is what prompts me to write this.

author: mariusvanderwijden
content: I found the ACDT call always pretty useful as a shelling point on whats the status for the devnets and testing for the next hardfork. Maybe we can reduce the expectation for people to join that are not involved in these task by scoping it closer to its original purpose again and making bigger decisions on ACD{E,C}

author: potuz
content: it's probably because EL topics have been discussed in more detail 😛

author: potuz
content: when we've tried to actually have a sync technical issue with ePBS, we could not get into details because of lack of time.

author: qu0b
content: Don't bail on us just before the first epbs devnet

author: potuz
content: I think the situation may change when we actually have an ePBS devnet running, but the point is that even then, we'll be packing more topics into a monster call that probably don't need everyone involved at all

author: tersec
content: One concern is that it's a kind of strange intermediate point where interesting decisions can't actually be made, because they they need to be deferred to ACDC/ACDE

author: parithosh
content: happy to discuss changing the cadence, we could also do every other week + async updates or something that works for everyone

author: tomi0x
content: I am of the opinion that one longer call every 2 weeks might be more fit for purpose

author: parithosh
content:
Yeah im not opposed to it, i feel like its seasonal - during early devnet cycles we have a lot to discuss but even right now it feels relatively light. I do think once epbs-devnets are live we'll have more again, esp with regards to PRs being made and discussed. The original idea was that we're more liberal with cancelling ACDT during periods where we dont need it regularly, we havent really used that option in a while.

cc <@892053833121923094> for opinions too!
